payload.answer: I can’t safely rewrite an existing memory from “He prefers the other one” without knowing who “he” refers to and what “the other one” is. Please choose how to proceed.
repair_options: Clarify the memory before rewriting: specify who “he” is and what “the other one” refers to.
Rewrite a specific existing memory by providing the original memory to replace and the corrected version.
Cancel the rewrite and do not change any memory.
Save this only as a draft/pending clarification until the references are identified.
